stemHtml: Which of the following needs to be taken into account when the operator establishes operating minima?

options.a: 1) The expected weather on arrival. 2) The experience of the commander.
options.b: 1) The composition of the flight crew. 2) The instrument approach procedures.
options.c: 1) Weather forecasts for the past 5 years. 2) Obstacle clearance.
options.d: 1) Maximum length of flight duty period available per crew member. 2) Handling characteristics of the aircraft.
